overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a moonlit prairie at night. The character traverses grassy terrain with scattered pine trees and distant rocky hills, briefly accompanied by a horse before continuing alone through the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with scattered pine trees

events.description: full moon becomes visible through the clouds in the night sky
horse companion that was walking alongside moves away and exits the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass, wearing a hat and coat suitable for frontier wilderness

notable_agents.action: horse walking parallel to the character for the first few seconds before veering away into the darkness

entered.detail: scattered evergreen trees silhouetted against the night sky
tall wild grasses covering the prairie floor
narrow worn trail winding through the grass
distant rocky outcrops and hills on the horizon
bright full moon visible through scattered clouds providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark prairie night with the character walking along a dirt trail through tall grass. A horse briefly accompanies the character on the left before moving away. The moon becomes visible through the clouds, illuminating the scattered pine trees and distant rocky hills while the character maintains a steady walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded grassland with prominent rocky formations

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the wilderness, navigating around trees and uneven terrain as the path winds through the grass

entered.detail: large rocky formation becoming prominent on the left side of the path
thicker grouping of pine trees on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through increasingly rugged terrain as the rocky hills on the left grow closer and more detailed. The tree coverage becomes denser, partially obscuring the night sky, while the path winds through the tall grass and scattered boulders. The horse is no longer visible as the character proceeds deeper into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit prairie that gradually transitions into a denser, more rugged wilderness. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail through tall grass, accompanied briefly by a horse on the left before the animal moves away. As the moon emerges through the clouds, the light illuminates scattered pine trees and distant rocky hills that slowly draw closer and become more detailed. The scene then shifts as the terrain grows increasingly rocky and the tree coverage densens, partially obscuring the night sky. Finally, the path winds through tall grass and scattered boulders, leading the character deeper into the wilderness alone.
